items.e: School bus at stop with hazards: walking pace both directions.
items.d: Bus mit Warnblinker: Schrittgeschwindigkeit, beide Richtungen.

items.e: Drive so you can stop within sight.
Town sign = instant 50, no extra signal.
End of a limit in town ≠ free — 50 still caps you.
items.d: Ende eines Limits innerorts ≠ frei — 50 bleibt.
